subject: rule-light-1
description: High budget + reactive = Mesh-WiFi Motion Sensors

subject: rule-light-1
object: Since you have a high budget and want reactive automation, Mesh-WiFi Motion Sensor Bulbs offer the most reliable presence-based triggers.

subject: rule-light-2
description: Low budget + scheduled = Basic Smart Plugs

subject: rule-light-2
object: For a low budget with scheduled needs, simple WiFi Smart Plugs connected to your existing lamps are the most cost-effective solution.

subject: rule-light-3
description: Medium budget + reactive = Bluetooth Motion Bulbs

subject: rule-light-3
object: Bluetooth motion bulbs balance cost with presence detection capabilities.

subject: rule-light-4
object: For manual control, standard WiFi smart bulbs hooked up to a hub are a great starting point.

subject: rule-light-5
description: Low budget + reactive = Motion Sensor Bulbs

subject: rule-light-5
object: For a low-cost sensor-based setup, entry-level motion sensor bulbs give you automatic lighting without needing a more expensive whole-home system.

subject: rule-light-6
object: We couldn't find a highly specialized rule for your exact combination, but standard Universal Smart Bulbs are a great reliable fallback!

subject: rule-climate-1
object: With a high budget, installing a flagship learning thermostat directly into your central HVAC system offers the most seamless and intelligent whole-home climate control.

subject: rule-climate-2
object: For a medium budget, placing Infrared Smart AC Controllers near your existing wall or window units gives you perfect app-based climate features without the heavy installation costs.

subject: rule-climate-3
description: Low budget = Smart Plugs for Fans/Heaters

subject: rule-climate-3
object: For a strict low budget, utilizing heavy-duty smart plugs on standalone fans and space heaters is the most affordable way to schedule and automate your personal climate.

subject: rule-climate-4
object: We couldn't find a specialized climate rule for your exact combination, but standard Generic Smart Thermostats are a great reliable fallback!

subject: rule-security-1
object: For a high budget, a PoE (Power over Ethernet) system with 4K cameras and a local DVR offers the best security and reliability without subscription fees.

subject: rule-security-2
object: A smart deadbolt adapter is the most budget-friendly way to add smart features to your existing locks without replacing the entire hardware.

subject: rule-security-3
object: We couldn't find a specialized camera rule for your budget, but a standard generic WiFi camera is a great entry-level choice.

subject: rule-security-4
object: We couldn't find a specialized lock rule for your budget, but a standard generic smart lock will work with most doors.

subject: rule-security-5
object: We couldn't find a specialized rule for your security setup, but a generic smart home security hub is a great way to start.
